title: Crunchy Dutch Cobnut Pancakes
description: A delicious and healthy Dutch dish featuring cobnuts, perfect for a brunch mood, with a jammy and bouncy texture, and a low-glycemic friendly soffritto base.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, eggs, soffritto mix, and salt.
Add the chopped cobnuts and melted butter to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes warm with a dollop of jam on top.
Garnish with additional chopped cobnuts if desired.
